mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_pic AS goodsPic, g.sell_price AS sellPrice, g.is_new AS isNew, g.stock, gc.create_time AS collectTime, u.nickname AS sellerNickname FROM goods_collect gc INNER JOIN goods g ON gc.goods_id = g.id INNER JOIN user u ON g.seller_id = u.id WHERE gc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY gc.create_time DESC
